creator: freebsd@igalic.co
text:
Created attachment 244472
net/cloud-init: new release: 23.3

upgrade net/cloud-init (and net/cloud-init-devel) to 23.3.

Changelog: https://github.com/canonical/cloud-init/releases/tag/23.3

Highlights: This release should be able to pass the unittest suite on
FreeBSD, once the appropriate python ports patches are merged.

Sponsored by: The FreeBSD Foundation
